pi_items.source: Medical literature: Multiple radiological studies show sella turcica AP diameter normal range is 5-17mm, with 5mm as the lower limit. Studies report ranges from approximately 5.0 to 17.0 mm.

Medical literature: Normal upper limit is 17mm per Taveras and Wood. Empty Sella Syndrome cases documented up to 24mm × 16mm (one case example found). The 25mm threshold is broader than normal range to accommodate some pathological cases.
Anatomical reference: Sella turcica is a saddle-shaped depression in the sphenoid bone containing the pituitary gland. Also called the pituitary fossa or hypophyseal fossa.

GitHub invesalius/invesalius3 v3.0 release: The download URL https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip is confirmed to be valid and redirects to a real asset on GitHub's CDN. The filename 0051.zip matches the series identifier.
Task configuration: This is the required output path specified in task.json and setup_task.sh. It is a valid Linux path for the ga user's home directory.

Medical literature: Multiple radiological studies report mean AP diameter values in the 10-16mm range, with overall normal range of 5-17mm per Taveras and Wood. Specific studies show: 10.45±2.79mm, 10.29mm±1.267, 11.5mm, 12.9mm, 14.1mm averages across different populations.

pi_items.metadata_value: from tuberculum sellae to dorsum sellae
pi_items.verified_value: from tuberculum sellae to dorsum sellae (or posterior sellar wall)
pi_items.source: Radiological reference: AP diameter is measured as the distance between the most anterior superior point of tuberculum sellae and the most posterior point on the dorsum sellae or posterior sellar wall. This is the standard measurement used in medical imaging.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves measuring the Sella Turcica (pituitary fossa), a saddle-shaped depression in the sphenoid bone that houses the pituitary gland. The anatomical measurement (Anterior-Posterior diameter from tuberculum sellae to dorsum sellae) is correctly described. Normal sella turcica AP diameter ranges from approximately 5-17 mm, with typical values between 10-16 mm across populations. The valid range in the task (5-25 mm) encompasses normal variation and some pathological cases like Empty Sella Syndrome, though the upper threshold of 25 mm is broader than the typical upper limit of 17 mm for normal anatomy. The DICOM data source is confirmed as real: InVesalius 3 v3.0 CT Cranium sample dataset (0051.zip) from the official GitHub repository at https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. The data is public, real-world medical imaging data (not synthetic).
